title: Assistant Store Manager - Forever 21 India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Forever 21 India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Forever 21 India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Forever 21 India:
Forever 21 India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Forever 21 India!
